Segments Ready

Hi {requester_name},

Alignment segments for {reciter_name} have been extracted successfully and a pull request has been opened for review.

{pr_link}

Next Steps

  1. Checkout the PR branch locally: 
    gh pr checkout {pr_number}
  2. Run the Inspector (python inspector/server.py) to review and fix segments
  3. Commit and push your corrections directly to the PR branch
  4. Once you're satisfied, click "Ready for review" on the PR page (or run gh pr ready)

View the full review guide →
